**What does this change?**
A short summary of the change and the reason for it.

**Checklist**
- [ ] `php -l` passes on changed files
- [ ] `php tests/run.php` and `php tests/run-dialog.php` pass
- [ ] Bumped version + `readme.txt` changelog (if behaviour changed)
- [ ] Follows the conventions in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
